input.tenant_message: I pulled out the air filter to check it and it's completely black — looks like it hasn't been replaced in a very long time. The AC has been running slower lately and there's been more dust than usual around the vents. I don't have a replacement filter on hand and wasn't sure what size to get. Can you send someone to replace it?

ai_output.recommended_action: Send maintenance staff to replace the air filter with the correct size (check unit label or existing filter for dimensions). Recommend switching to a MERV-8 or higher filter and establishing a 60-90 day replacement schedule. Check for any airflow restriction or coil buildup that may have resulted from the neglected filter.
